[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101010000 3
1 0110100110 5
2 1010100000 3
3 1010001011 5
4 0100001010 3
5 1010000101 4
6 0111000100 4
7 1110110100 6
